description: A subscriber claims they were incorrectly billed after downgrading their streaming plan.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the subscriber's account and billing history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the subscriber and the disputed charge.

nodes.task_description: Verify the date of the plan change and the billing cycle dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the plan was changed mid-cycle, resulting in prorated charges.

nodes.task_description: Explain the prorated charges and apply a small courtesy credit to resolve the complaint.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the bill and successfully applies a credit.
